content.full_text:
SAN DIEGO COUNTY YOUNG REPUBLICANS
@
Ftr
Educalion, Aclion, Leadership
416? 45th Street, San Diego, California 
92105
April 11, 1991
Fair Political Practices Commission
Legal Department
428 "J" Street, Suite 800
sacramento, cA 95814
Dear Legal Department :
This letter lequests formal, written advice on the subject
described below pursuant to California Government Code S 83114(b).
The San Diego County Young Republicans ( "SDCYRS") is a county
chapter of the California Young Republicans, Inc. a statewide
Republican volunteer organization. The SDCYRS plan to hold a
fundraiser in June of 1991 (the "EVENT" ).
Federal, state, and loca1 legislators will provide some of
the printing, stationary, and postage for the EVENT. The funds
raised from the EVENT vri11 be used only for SDCYR fundraising
expenses, administrative costs, membership mailings, and meeting
expen6es. The funds raised from the EVENT will not be used to make
contributions to federal, state, or local candidates. The funds
raised from the EVENT wilL not be used to support state or loca],
ballot measures, voter registration, get-out-the-vote activities,
or sample ballots.
Based upon the facts set forth above, the SDCYRS ask for
advice concerning the following two questions.
QIIESTIOI{ | 1: Are the donated mailing expenses or the funds
laised at the EVENT considered contributions pursuant to the
California Government Code?
QUESTION *2: 
Will the SDCYRS, or the California 
young
Republicans, Inc., be required to register and/or report as
a "politicaL conmittee " under the California Government Code?
Thank you for your time and efforts.
Very truLy yours,
E,zcbL'
BiIl Baber
SDCYRS General Counsel
